extracted_claim.claim_summary: The customer is claiming that the corner of the package is crushed.

image_assessments.notes: The image clearly shows a package with a crushed corner.
The image shows a close-up of the package with a crushed corner.

result.user_claim: Customer: Parcel receive hua toh corner dab gaya tha. | Support: Aap item damage claim kar rahe hain ya packaging? | Customer: Sirf package corner damage. Item abhi open nahi kiya. | Support: Full view aur close-up dono upload kiya? | Customer: Haan, package corner crushed hai.
result.evidence_standard_met_reason: At least one image shows the claimed package_corner with sufficient clarity to evaluate the claim.
result.claim_status_justification: Images confirm the claimed package_corner with visible crushed_packaging. Supporting images: img_1;img_2.
